## Summary

-

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated when behavior changed
- [ ] Type tests added or updated when public types changed
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:dist` passes when exports/build changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] Breaking changes are called out clearly
